calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:HOWARD CHUNG FOR PLAINTIFF KAY MAY KWONG, ALSO PRESENT.
LANA KWKONG, INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF
DEFENDANT NEAL EVAN DRY IN PRO PER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD.
DEFENDANT TO VACATE 587 40TH AVENUE, UPPER FLAT, SAN FRANCISCO ON OR BEFORE 5PM 12/15/04. AND TO RETURN KEYS TO PLAINTIFFS ATTORNEY AT 788-1280.
PLAINTIFF TO WAIVE ALL RENT OWED. DEFENDANT WAIVES ALL RIGHTS TO SECURITY DEPOSIT AND INTEREST.
EACH PARTY WAIVES ALL CLAIMS, RIGHTS AND CAUSES OF ACTION WITH RESPECT TO LEASE AND THESE PREMISES.
DEFENDANT WILL NOT SUBLET PREMISES.
IF DEFENDANT VACATES TIMELY, PLAINTIFF WILL PREPARE AND FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AND PROVIDE A COPY TO DEFENDANT.
PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE WRITTEN STIPULATION AND FILE WITH COURT.
IF DEFENDANT BREACHES AGREEMENT, PLAINTILL HAS RIGHT TO APPEAR EXPARTE AND OBTAIN JUDGMENT.

JUDGE PRO TEM:LARRY CURTICE: CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:ANN MENDOZA (218)
